testcase.name: Cart.vue > 空购物车时显示空状态
testcase.system-err: [Vue Router warn]: No match found for location with path "/"

testcase.name: Cart.vue > 有商品时计算合计金额
Cart.vue > unitPrice 格式化正确
Cart.vue > subtotal 计算正确
Checkout.vue > 渲染结算页面标题
testcase.system-err: [Vue Router warn]: No match found for location with path "/"

testcase.name: Checkout.vue > 渲染收货信息表单字段
Checkout.vue > 包含课程标识
CourseBadge.vue > 渲染课程标识文本
CourseBadge.vue > 包含 course-badge CSS 类
示例测试 > 1 + 1 = 2
Home.vue > 渲染搜索栏

testcase.name: Login.vue > 渲染登录表单和课程标识
Login.vue > 包含注册链接
API: order.js > submitOrder calls POST /orders with data
API: order.js > getOrderList calls GET /orders with params
API: order.js > getOrderDetail calls GET /orders/:orderId
API: order.js > payOrder calls POST /orders/:id/pay
API: order.js > cancelOrder calls POST /orders/:id/cancel
API: order.js > confirmOrder calls POST /admin/orders/:id/confirm
API: order.js > shipOrder calls POST /admin/orders/:id/ship
API: order.js > getAdminOrderList calls GET /admin/orders with params
API: order.js > rejects on network error
API: product.js > getProductList calls GET /products with params
API: product.js > getProductDetail calls GET /products/:id
API: product.js > createProduct calls POST /admin/products with data
API: product.js > updateProduct calls PUT /admin/products/:id with data
API: product.js > deleteProduct calls DELETE /admin/products/:id
API: product.js > getAdminProductList calls GET /admin/products with params
API: product.js > rejects on network error
AppFooter.vue > renders copyright text
AppFooter.vue > renders with correct scoped class
AppFooter.vue > includes CourseBadge component
NavHeader.vue > renders app title and navigation items
NavHeader.vue > does not show user menu when not logged in
Dashboard.vue > renders admin dashboard layout
Dashboard.vue > includes NavHeader and AppFooter
Dashboard.vue > shows product management card with description
Dashboard.vue > shows order management card with description
Dashboard.vue > renders cards with clickable cursor style
Dashboard.vue > navigates to /admin/products when product card is clicked
Dashboard.vue > navigates to /admin/orders when order card is clicked
OrderManage.vue > loads orders on mount
OrderManage.vue > renders page title and layout
OrderManage.vue > shows confirm button for pending orders
OrderManage.vue > calls confirmOrder when confirm button is clicked
OrderManage.vue > reloads orders after successful confirm
OrderManage.vue > handles API error gracefully
ProductManage.vue > loads products on mount and renders page title
ProductManage.vue > includes NavHeader and AppFooter
ProductManage.vue > renders "新增商品" button
ProductManage.vue > renders edit and 下架 buttons
ProductManage.vue > opens dialog when showDialog is set
ProductManage.vue > sets isEdit=false and default form for new product
ProductManage.vue > resetForm clears all reactive form fields
ProductManage.vue > editProduct fills form and opens dialog in edit mode
ProductManage.vue > calls createProduct when saving a new product
ProductManage.vue > calls updateProduct when saving an existing product
ProductManage.vue > calls deleteProduct when handleDelete is called
ProductManage.vue > reloads product list after delete
ProductManage.vue > handles deleteProduct API error gracefully
ProductManage.vue > editProduct handles products with missing optional fields
